Metadata.SourceFile: Davy - King of the Wild Frontier.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "DAVYKINGOFTHEWILDFRONTIER-C000-7940" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3f sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Davy - King of the Wild Frontier.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C000 which: 1. Copies 1024 bytes of data from $C030 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this allows the in-game speech to work correctly) 2. Jumps to the entry point at $7940 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code)
